stemHtml: The Pilot in Command (PIC) arrives at the aircraft, while an engineer is leaving and a technician is about to install a component in the engine. The tech log book is already correctly filled in and signed. What should the PIC do?

options.a: PIC has to call the engineer so that he verifies verbally that the work has been completed correctly.
options.b: Ask the technician to confirm that the component has been installed according to necessary procedures.
options.c: Everything is completed and the aircraft is ready to depart.
options.d: The entry is invalid because the tech log book was filled in before the work was done.
